commit.subject: LU-16352 tests: hsm_import mdt+raid
commit.message:
LU-16352 tests: hsm_import mdt+raid

Check that HSM import restores DOM component
together with RAID0 after hsm_import.

HPE-bug-id: LUS-11209
Test-Parameters: fortestonly testlist=sanity-hsm env=ONLY=11d
Change-Id: Ief618d39b07bfa9b4d21adb8e86b624482f3513b
Signed-off-by: Sergey Cheremencev <sergey.cheremencev@hpe.com>
